ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model */,
  "hyperparameters_json" TEXT /* JSON column to store hyperparameters in a structured format */,
  "training_data_path" TEXT /* Path to the training data used for the model */,
  "evaluation_data_path" TEXT /* Path to the evaluation data used for the model */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "random_state" INTEGER /* Random state used for evaluation */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the model */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the model */,
  "balanced_accuracy" REAL /* Balanced accuracy of the model */,
  "f1" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., cross-validation, holdout) */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the evaluation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_random_state FOREIGN KEY ("random_state") REFERENCES random_states ("random_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_project" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store user permissions in a structured format */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_project" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user in the project (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., cross-validation, holdout) */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the evaluation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the model */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the model */,
  "balanced_accuracy" REAL /* Balanced accuracy of the model */,
  "f1" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "random_states" (
  "random_state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the random state */,
  "random_state" INTEGER /* Random state used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("random_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_random_state" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "random_state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the random state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id", "random_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "hyperparameter" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "hyperparameter")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_architectures" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access log */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
